<!--
Thanks for opening a PR. Please fill in every section below. Write `n/a` if a
section truly does not apply, with a one-line reason.

See contributing/repository/pull-request-descriptions.md for the full guidance.

Do not disclose security vulnerabilities or proposed vulnerability fixes in a
public PR. Follow SECURITY.md first.
-->

## Summary

<!--
Two or three sentences, or up to three bullets, describing what changed at a
behavioural level. Frame it from a protocol, package, or developer-facing
perspective rather than a file-by-file diff.
-->

## Why

<!--
The motivation. Link related issues with `Closes #NN` or `Related: #NN` when
applicable.
-->

## Test plan

<!--
A checklist of what you actually verified. Include automated commands and any
manual verification. Be explicit about anything important that remains untested.
-->

- [ ] `bun run check`
- [ ] `bun run check-types`
- [ ] `bun run test`
- [ ] `bun run build`
- [ ] manual verification or n/a

## Notes

<!--
Optional. Rollout order, compatibility concerns, follow-ups, generated fixture
updates, performance measurements, or anything else a reviewer should know.
-->
